curation.synopsis: After decades stretched thin across the galaxy, the exhausted veterans of the Brimlock Eleventh are promised one final reward: to win a single last campaign and then settle the distant world of Voor in peace. Standing between them and that retirement is a feral ork infestation, sprung from a crashed ork rok and now spreading unchecked across the planet. Major Stanhope, the haunted Lieutenant Carson, the amnesiac Private Blank and the unbending Commissar Reeve drag their worn-out regiment into a brutal colonial war that grows uglier than any of them imagined. Told partly from the orks' own savage point of view, it is a bleak, Zulu-flavoured study of soldiers fighting one war too many.
